job_description:
Highlights
Work directly with General Manager driving AI strategy across divisions
Hands-on role building cutting-edge AI solutions, not just coding
Become the go-to AI expert in a forward-thinking finance company

Position summary

Join our dynamic team as an AI Implementation Specialist (Junior) and become the technical engine driving intelligent automation across a leading finance company. In this hands-on role, you'll bridge the gap between business challenges and cutting-edge AI solutions, working directly with the General Manager to deploy Generative AI and automation tools across Sales, Advisory, Marketing, and Analytics divisions. You'll leverage your expertise in LLM APIs such as OpenAI and Anthropic, combined with Python programming and automation platforms like Zapier and Make, to build workflow solutions that enhance efficiency and profitability. Collaborating with our Head Programmer, you'll integrate AI capabilities into our bespoke CRM system, transforming it into an intelligent assistant while applying Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques to enrich data-driven insights. Your strong technical communication skills will be essential as you educate staff on AI adoption, translate complex concepts for non-technical stakeholders, and ensure compliance with Australian financial services data privacy standards. This role demands problem-solving agility, cross-functional collaboration, and a tinkerer's mindset to stay ahead of emerging AI models and technologies. You'll be the subject matter expert on Generative AI, driving innovation and delivering tangible business impact across every division.


About the company

Our goal at Australian Stock Report is to keep you updated about the best market opportunities and to guide you on when and how to capitalise on these opportunities by using our reports. This includes Australian shares price movement and fluctuations along with our expert analysis of the companies we are considering.

We also understand that educating our clients about financial markets may improve their ability to trade regardless of trend and volatility.

With new articles and insights each day, plus a variety of interactive webinars and Q & A sessions you can participate in, the Australian Stock Report really is the number one destination for daily Australian stock market news and consistent share updates.


About the role
Translate business challenges from Analysts and Sales teams into practical AI-driven solutions.
Collaborate with the Head Programmer to integrate AI capabilities into the company's bespoke CRM system.
Design and implement workflow automation using Python and platforms like Zapier or Make.
Develop and deploy Generative AI solutions across Sales, Advisory, Marketing and Analytics divisions.
Serve as the subject matter expert on LLM APIs, RAG implementations and AI automation tools.
Deliver training sessions to staff on AI tool usage, ensuring safe and effective adoption.
Stay current with emerging AI models and technologies to identify new opportunities for business improvement.
Maintain high standards of data privacy and security in line with Australian financial services regulations.
About the candidate
Demonstrated experience working with Large Language Model APIs, particularly OpenAI or Anthropic platforms.
Proficiency in Python programming with a focus on automation and workflow optimisation.
Hands-on experience with automation tools such as Zapier or Make for business process integration.
Knowledge of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems and their practical applications.
Background in traditional coding practices to complement AI implementation work.
Experience integrating AI solutions into CRM systems or similar business platforms.
Strong understanding of data privacy and security requirements within Australian financial services.
Exceptional ability to translate technical AI concepts into clear, jargon-free language for non-technical stakeholders.
Self-directed learner who actively stays current with emerging AI models and technologies.
Proven problem-solving skills with the ability to identify business pain points and design technical solutions.
Experience training or educating staff on new technology tools and systems.
Collaborative mindset with the ability to work effectively across multiple business divisions.
Proactive and entrepreneurial approach to identifying AI opportunities within business operations.
Strong attention to detail and commitment to delivering secure, compliant AI implementations.
Adaptable communicator who can engage effectively with both technical and business-focused team members.

cv.summary: **AI Implementation Specialist** with expertise in Generative AI, Large Language Model APIs, and Python programming. Proven track record of delivering AI-driven solutions, improving efficiency, and driving business growth. Proficient in automation tools, data privacy, and security. Strong technical communication skills and experience in educating staff on AI adoption.

experience.company: Monash University (Industry collaboration with Energy Safe Victoria)
bullets: **Automated web data collection** using Playwright and Selenium; cleaned and structured raw HTML/text via Markdown parsing before storing in Databricks.
**Applied Azure AI services** for confidence scoring and compliance validation; integrated results into Databricks workflows.
**Developed GenAI-powered classification and compliance checks**, with outputs visualised in Power BI dashboards for stakeholder use.
**Improved on-time delivery** by aligning production schedules with demand forecasts using SAP.
**Maintained 95%+ output targets** by monitoring operations and resolving daily production issues.
**Reduced recurring quality issues** by 35% through root cause analysis and structured reporting.
**Led 40+ inspections and corrective actions**, ensuring 98% ISO audit compliance.

projects.name: EEG-Based Depression Detection (AI Research Project)
projects.tech: Data Clearning, Optimization system, Model performance measurement and data storytelling
bullets: **Developed ML and DL models** using EEG alpha/gamma features for depression classification.
**Achieved 98% accuracy** on controlled datasets, with attention to generalization and real-world applicability.
